keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY VISION. Vision : Arg-n., Aur., Bell., Con., Cycl., Gels., Hyo., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rut., Sep., Sil., Stram., Sul. Vision, acute : Hyo. Vision, affected , glittering, motes, dim, etc., then headache : Gels., Glo., Grap., Iris., Kali-bi., Lach., Nat-m., Pho., Pod., Psor., Sep., Sul., Ther., Tub. Vision, black , suddenly, blind spells, etc. : Bell., Cic., Con., Glo., Hyo., Merc., Nat-m., Old., Pho., Pul., Sil., Stram. Vision, blindness : Con., Hyo., Op., Pul., Sil., Stram. Vision, dazzled : Kali-c., Sil. Vision, dim , blurred, etc. : Calc-c., Cann., Caust., Con., Euphr., Gels., Hep., Pho., Pul., Sil. Vision, farsight : Calc-c., Nat-m., Sep., Sil. Vision, flickering , flames, red, etc. : Bell., Cycl., Grap., Hyo., Kali-c., Pho., Sep., Spig. Vision, glimmerings : Grap., Iod., Nux-v. Vision, illusions of : Bry., Hyo., Spig., Stram., Ver-a. Vision, illusions of, animals, bugs, etc. : Cimi., Hyo., Stram. Vision, illusions of, bright objects : Hyo., Val. Vision, illusions of, colors : Bell., Pho. Vision, illusions of, colors, black : Pho., Sil., Stram. Vision, illusions of, colors, blue : Crot-c., Lyc., Zin-ar. Vision, illusions of, colors, dark, rich, etc. : Stram. Vision, illusions of, colors, green : Pho. Vision, illusions of, colors, rainbow : Pho-ac. Vision, illusions of, colors, red : Bell., Pho., Sul. Vision, illusions of, colors, striped : Sep. Vision, illusions of, colors, yellow : Dig., Sep. Vision, illusions of, diplopia : Aur., Bell., Cic., Gels., Hyo., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Pul., Sul., Ver-a., Ver-v. Vision, illusions of, fantastic, apparitions, etc. : Bell., Stram., Ver-a. Vision, illusions of, fiery, bright, etc. (Comp. Red.) : Bell., Hyo., Kali-c., Pho., Spig. Vision, illusions of, flies, musca volitantes, etc. : Agar., Sil., Stram. Vision, illusions of, flies, musca volitantes, etc., right : Chin-s., Cimi., Sele., Sil. Vision, illusions of, flies, musca volitantes, etc., left : Agar., Calc-c., Caust., Merc., Sul. Vision, illusions of, halos : Lach., Pho., Pul., Sul. Vision, illusions of, hemiopia : Lyc., Nat-m. Vision, illusions of, imaginary, on closing eyes : Bell., Bry., Calc-c., Thu. Vision, illusions of, large, as if too : Pho. Vision, illusions of, letters running together : Bur-p., Nat-m., Sil. Vision, illusions of, lightnings : Spig. Vision, illusions of, mist : Calc-c., Caust., Crot-c., Pho. Vision, illusions of, near, too : Bov. Vision, illusions of, small, as if too : Plat. Vision, illusions of, spotted : Am-m., Kali-c., Pho., Sil. Vision, illusions of, veil, as of a : Pho. Vision, images , retina retains, too long : Gels., Jab., Lac-c., Nat-m., Tab., Tub. Vision, light , aversion to : Hyo. Vision, light, desire : Gels., Stram. Vision, nearsight : Con., Nit-ac., Pho-ac., Pho., Pul. Vision, pale : Sil. Vision, paralysis of optic nerve : Bell., Caust., Con., Gels., Hyo., Pho., Pul., Sec-c., Sil., Stram., Sul. Vision, weak : Anac., Bell., Chin., Nat-m. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
